column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty holding a traditional wagasa in the rain" | TEXT="雨ですね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty looking up at a grey sky gently" | TEXT="降りそうです" P3: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty extending hand to catch rain softly" | TEXT="冷たい" P4: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty holding blooming hydrangeas gracefully" | TEXT="綺麗に咲いてます" P5: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty listening to the sound of rain" | TEXT="静かですね" P6: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty looking out from the engawa on a rainy day" | TEXT="のんびりしましょう" P7: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty gently walking avoiding puddles" | TEXT="足元ご用心" P8: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty smiling with a wet kimono sleeve" | TEXT="濡れちゃった" P9: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty bringing an extra umbrella kindly" | TEXT="傘どうぞ"
